title: verbascum × rubiginosum
intro: Verbascum × rubiginosum, also known as mullein, is a hybrid plant species belonging to the Verbascum genus, characterized by its tall stature and large, fuzzy leaves. Traditionally, the leaves and flowers of Verbascum × rubiginosum have been used in herbal medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant effects. The health benefits of Verbascum × rubiginosum include relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as skin conditions like eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of Verbascum × rubiginosum can be made into teas, tinctures, salves, and infusions to utilize its medicinal properties.
